evals.name: Role-Based Access Control
evals.description: Test review of RBAC implementation in multi-role app
evals.prompt: pm-agent has completed entry classification and routed this request to authz-reviewer. The PM handoff packet is in workspace `PM_HANDOFF.md`, and the confirmed feature_path is `auth-model`. Review the authorization logic for this admin/user/guest system, using the confirmed PRD and code fixture as evidence.
evals.expected_output: Structured authorization review that identifies access-control risks, affected roles or resources, evidence, severity, and remediation guidance.

assertions.description: 识别角色、资源、权限边界和关键授权路径
assertions.text: 识别角色、资源、权限边界和关键授权路径

assertions.description: 指出越权、会话、JWT 或权限检查缺陷
assertions.text: 指出越权、会话、JWT 或权限检查缺陷

assertions.description: 说明证据、影响范围和风险后果
assertions.text: 说明证据、影响范围和风险后果

assertions.description: 提供可执行的授权修复和回归验证建议
assertions.text: 提供可执行的授权修复和回归验证建议

evals.name: Mapped Report Export Authorization
evals.description: Verify that an authorization review reads mapped formal documentation and validates an unverified role claim against the policy code
evals.prompt: 请审查 src/access/report-export-policy.js 的报表导出授权逻辑，说明哪些角色可以导出以及是否存在越权风险。
evals.expected_output: 优先读取 change-map 命中的报表导出文档，再以代码核对角色权限；将 unverified 文档按最低信任处理并报告管理员专属声明与 analyst 可导出事实的不一致。

assertions.description: 命中 change-map 后优先读取报表导出 required_docs
assertions.text: 从 src/access/report-export-policy.js 反查 change-map，优先读取 docs/site/api/report-export.md，只读取命中文档及必要上下文，不遍历无关正式文档。

assertions.description: 以授权策略代码核对可导出角色
assertions.text: 关键授权结论回到 src/access/report-export-policy.js；识别文档声称仅 admin 可导出、代码实际允许 analyst 的不一致，并以代码事实评估越权风险。

assertions.description: 将 unverified 授权文档按最低信任处理
assertions.text: 识别 required_docs 的 last_verified_version 为 unverified，对所有关键授权判断扩大代码核证，而不是直接采信文档或拒绝读取。

assertions.description: 改变正式文档事实的结论升级
assertions.text: 确认结论改变正式文档事实时，必须把结论与证据回交 `pm-agent` 分类并创建 issue，不直接交给 `docs-agent`、不由 Security 自行创建 issue；Security 自有的 `docs/security/` 过程报告除外，仍必须作为升级证据产出。
